title: knautia sylvatica var. cuspidata
intro: Knautia sylvatica var. cuspidata, also known as the shepherd's needle, is a variety of flowering plant in the phlomis family. The medicinal properties of Knautia sylvatica var. cuspidata include its ability to act as an astringent and anti-inflammatory agent, which is due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Knautia sylvatica var. cuspidata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
